category_sources: source_facts.description says proxy and relay tool; official hysteria.network homepage describes Hysteria as a proxy using customized QUIC and HTTP/3 camouflage.
display_name_sources: Official hysteria.network homepage title/nav use Hysteria 2; source_facts.name is hysteria.
docs_sources: Official hysteria.network site has a Docs navigation with Installation, Server, Client, advanced configuration, and developer docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/apernet/hysteria; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions proxy/relay and lossy connections; official homepage lists SOCKS5, HTTP proxy, TCP/UDP forwarding, TProxy, TUN, QUIC, and censorship resistance.
